# Bounded Monocular Perception

## Overview

The system estimates vehicle distance from a fixed monocular camera.

The pipeline separates locator, foreground extraction, preprocessing, and model inference.

## Results

The selected model achieved 0.015856 m synthetic validation MAE.

## Live Runtime

The live runtime supports trace capture.

## Scope

This is not a general-purpose monocular 3D vision system.

The approach transfers to real camera footage.

## Process

Failures were investigated through trace-backed incident analysis.
